title: How IAEA Safeguards Work
summary: In this presentation, Matthew Bunn provides an overview of how IAEA Safeguards work. This presentation has been used for Nuclear 101 seminars as well as for his class, "Controlling the World's Most Dangerous Weapons." This particular presentation was used on September 20, 2013.
body: In this presentation, Matthew Bunn provides an overview of how IAEA Safeguards work. This presentation has been used for Nuclear 101 seminars as well as for his class, "Controlling the World's Most Dangerous Weapons." This particular presentation was used on September 20, 2013.
